svg.title: Workflow part 1 — request entry and auth pipeline
svg.desc: From user interaction through Axios HTTP request, Zod validation, JWT auth middleware, and admin role guard, showing 400/401/403 error exits and the happy path into controller logic.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What user actions trigger API calls in the Smart Canteen App?')
sendPrompt('How does Axios attach the JWT token to every request?')
sendPrompt('What does Zod validation check in the Express middleware?')
sendPrompt('What error details does a 400 Validation Error return?')
sendPrompt('How does requireAuth middleware verify the JWT token?')
sendPrompt('When is 401 Unauthorized returned vs 403 Forbidden?')
sendPrompt('How does the router classify a route as admin-only?')
sendPrompt('How does the isAdmin middleware work?')
sendPrompt('Which routes return 403 Forbidden in the API?')
sendPrompt('What business logic runs inside the controller layer?')
